description_long: This is a single black slip-on flat shoe with a rounded toe and a low-profile sole. The upper is predominantly black with a decorative orange and white swirl pattern on the toe area, adding a touch of visual interest. The sole appears to be made of a brownish material, likely rubber or synthetic, and is thin and flat, suitable for casual urban wear. The shoe has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and the interior is dark, suggesting a fabric or synthetic lining. There are no visible fasteners, laces, or straps, indicating a simple slip-on design. The overall condition appears new, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A black slip-on flat shoe with an orange and white swirl design on the toe and a brown sole, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a new appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe and the opening of the shoe, with the orange and white swirl pattern partially visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth black upper and the thin brown sole, with the decorative toe design just visible at the front.
description_view_2: Direct toe view displaying the full orange and white swirl pattern on the toe and the shoe's opening.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black upper, brown sole, and the decorative pattern at the toe.
